title: Amethyst Loot
description: 💫 Amethyst Loot provides tons of new tools and utility items to use in any scenario. You can enjoy your worlds with amethyst armor, super tools, ores, goblins, advancements, and so much more! ⚠️ THIS MOD IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT, SO THERE'S STILL UNFINISH
body:
![Amethyst Loot!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2f36896c636893ba1f36576be70e148ea672686.png)

# Welcome to **Amethyst Loot**!

💫 The one and only mod that provides tons of upcoming amethyst crafted tools/armor; with many advancements, the player has more goals to do.

Updates may release slow, due to me being a solo dev with only 2 of my other buddies.

Thank you!

- **Rapture_** - 💫 Lead Developer
- **rayan** - 💫 Lead Idea Manager
